subcodes.first_line: This is a Book which We have sent down in truth and made a remembrance unto all the worlds. Verily, it is the Breath of the All-Merciful amidst all created things and a sign [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزلناه بالحق و جعلناه تذکره للعالمین انه لنفحه الرحمن بین الامکان و آیه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @high station of the true believer, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @living waters; water of life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
